items.title: JBL’s PartyBox Bluetooth speaker with up to 15 hours play time is $300 off today (All-time low)
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale on speakers, Woot is offering JBL’s PartyBox 520 Bluetooth speaker for $579.95 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This speaker regularly goes for $880 at Amazon where it’s currently going for its full price and has never dropped below the $700 mark. Today’s Woot deal knocks $300 off its usual price, bringing it $120 under its previous all-time low. This is the lowest we have seen this model fetch to date, and it’s a solid pick overall for parties, offering up to 15 hours of playback on a single charge along with a bunch of other features, which you can explore below.
